runTitle: Production QA - alert history modal AI prefill
coveredSurfaces: alert history AI prefill button rendering
skippedSurfaces: resolved alert history promptOverride path (live history contained only current firing alert during this run)

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before production QA; effective total 16.6220 USD and billed cost 0.0000.

artifacts.label: Alert history modal prefill opens AI sidebar with selected alert context

completedImprovements.title: 알림 이력 모달에서 AI 사이드바 컨텍스트 자동 주입
completedImprovements.evidence: Production alert history modal rendered an AI button for the live firing CPU alert, and clicking api-was-dc1-01:9100 CPU opened the AI sidebar with the selected alert context prefilled.
completedImprovements.note: Live alert history contained only one current firing CPU alert during this run, so resolved-history promptOverride wording was not exercised on production.

notes: Verified the live alert history modal rendered 'AI에게 api-was-dc1-01:9100 CPU 알림 분석 요청' for the current firing alert.
Verified clicking the button opened the AI sidebar and prefilled 'api-was-dc1-01:9100 서버의 CPU 사용률이 82%입니다. 현재 원인과 우선 조치 방법을 분석해줘.' in the input.
Resolved-history promptOverride behavior remains covered by local DOM tests because the live history set did not include a resolved CPU/MEM/DISK alert during this run.
